wave.title: Hi, I’m Applo!
wave.text: I help you create honest applications.

hero.title: Applications that fit <highlight>you</highlight>, not an invented version of you.
hero.lead: Applo writes cover letters and résumés from your real profile: AI-powered, ATS-optimized, and transparent. You stay in control; the AI does not make things up.

receipt.note: Grounding check active: no invented metrics.

how.title: Your finished application in three steps
how.lead: From résumé to sent, ATS-optimized application — without copy-paste chaos.

one.title: Upload profile & CV
one.desc: Upload your résumé. The resume parser reads it and fills your profile automatically. You review and correct it.

two.title: Add the job posting
two.desc: Paste a job as text, URL, or PDF. The AI writes a cover letter and résumé tailored to the posting and optimized for ATS.

three.title: Export as PDF
three.desc: Choose from 50 ATS templates, export as PDF (DE/EN), and apply. Done.

features.title: Everything an honest application needs
features.lead: Concrete tools instead of empty promises. Built so your application is strong <emphasis>and</emphasis> true.

generation.title: AI generation
generation.desc: Self-review and an ATS keyword loop refine your cover letter and CV automatically, based on your real data.

ingestion.title: Smart job ingestion
ingestion.desc: Import jobs from Indeed, LinkedIn, and Glassdoor as text, URL, or PDF.

validation.title: Application check
validation.desc: ATS score plus traffic-light feedback shows what can be improved before you send it.

templates.title: 50 ATS PDF templates
templates.desc: Cleanly structured templates in German and English, optimized for applicant tracking systems.

interviews.title: Mock interviews
interviews.desc: Practice interviews by text or voice and get concrete feedback.<tag>Premium</tag>

tracking.title: Email tracking
tracking.desc: Connect Outlook/M365. Your application status updates automatically.<tag>Premium</tag>

languages.title: Multilingual DE/EN
languages.desc: Create and export applications in German or English.

pipeline.title: Live pipeline status
pipeline.desc: Keep every application and its current status in one place.

values.title: Honest. Verifiable. On your side.
values.lead: Transparency is not a feature checkbox — it is the foundation. We say clearly what happens and what does not.

grounded.title: No invented data
grounded.desc: The AI uses only what your profile supports. A grounding check flags invented metrics before they enter your application.

eu.title: Your data stays in the EU
eu.desc: Hosting and storage happen in the EU, under GDPR.

audio.title: Interviews: no audio stored
audio.desc: Mock interviews keep only the transcript and feedback, never the audio recording.

email.title: Email tracking without content
email.desc: We read the status, not your messages. Email contents are not stored.

security.title: Security built in
security.desc: HttpOnly JWTs, 2FA, CSRF protection, rate limiting, and audit logs are active by default.

candidate.title: For you, not recruiters
candidate.desc: Your profile is the basis of your applications, not a searchable showcase for companies.

items.spam: No mass-spam applications in your name.
items.fake: No fake achievements and no invented metrics.
items.sale: No selling your data, to anyone.

pricing.title: Fair and without surprises
pricing.lead: Start free. Upgrade only when you need more. Cancel anytime.

data.a: Your data is hosted and stored in the EU under GDPR. We do not sell your data. Mock interviews store no audio, and email tracking stores no email content.

fabrication.q: Does the AI invent things about me?
fabrication.a: No. The AI uses only what your profile supports. A grounding check flags invented metrics so nothing untrue enters your application.

recruiters.q: Can recruiters see or find my profile?
recruiters.a: No. Your profile is the private basis for your own applications, not a searchable showcase. Companies cannot use it to search for you.

languages.q: Which languages can I apply in?
languages.a: You can create applications in German and English and export them as PDFs.

cancel.a: Yes, anytime. Free stays free; paid plans have no long-term lock-in.

ownership.a: You do. Your profile and content belong to you. Applo uses them only to create your applications.

final.title: Ready for honest applications?
final.lead: Start free: no invented data, no mass-spam applications.

footer.tagline: Applications from your real profile: honest, ATS-optimized, hosted in the EU.
